title: 5 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, planning phase
summary: A Google Cloud tutorial on planning and setup practices for using Antigravity 2.0, an AI agent tool, on complex enterprise codebases. The video covers five planning tactics: linking multiple repositories, establishing coding standards hierarchy, sandboxing and isolation, voice input for requirements, and agent self-interrogation before execution begins.
